message:
refactor(beads): Consolidate testing beads, remove duplicates

Closed 10 duplicate beads that overlapped with Theme 5 (bd-1jt.5):
- bd-130 (epic) - Theme 5 already serves this purpose
- bd-1gm - test_signing.sh already exists
- bd-2nn, bd-37y, bd-335 - covered by bd-1jt.5.14
- bd-9vb, bd-1wc, bd-1v5, bd-1s5, bd-h12, bd-312 - covered by bd-1jt.5.3

Kept 8 valuable beads with detailed descriptions:
- 5 unit test beads for modules without tests (config, github,
  host_selector, quality_gates, toolchain_detect)
- 3 test infrastructure beads (logging, runner, coverage)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
